title: DFU Update All - Intermittent failure after PC downgrade while headset connected to app
steps: Launch the mobile app and connect to the headset.
Verify headset is connected and app shows current firmware version.
While headset remains connected to the app, perform a PC-based firmware downgrade of the headset.
Wait for PC downgrade to complete (headset may disconnect/reconnect from app).
Do NOT restart the mobile app.
Open the mobile app and navigate to the 'Update All' / DFU section.
Tap 'Update All' to attempt updating the headset firmware.
Observe the result of the 'Update All' action.
expected: The 'Update All' action should complete successfully, updating the headset to the latest firmware. The headset should not remain in an outdated state. If the update fails intermittently, the app should provide a clear restart or retry option without requiring a full app restart.

title: DFU Update All - Headset outdated with no restart option after PC downgrade + charge stand downgrade
steps: Connect the headset to the mobile app.
Perform a PC-based firmware downgrade of the headset.
Unplug the headset from the PC.
Perform a PC-based firmware downgrade of the charge stand.
Place the headset on the charge stand.
Open the mobile app (do NOT restart it).
Navigate to the 'Update All' section.
Tap 'Update All'.
Observe if the update proceeds or fails.
If the update fails, check whether a 'Restart' or 'Retry' button is available.
Close and reopen the mobile app.
Navigate again to 'Update All' and check the headset firmware status.
expected: After the PC downgrade sequence, the 'Update All' action should either succeed or, if it fails, provide a visible 'Restart' or 'Retry' option. The headset should not remain stuck in an outdated state with no recovery path. After restarting the app, the headset should be detectable and updatable.

title: DFU Update All - Multi-step sequence: app connect + PC downgrade + unplug + charge stand downgrade + place headset + tap Update All
steps: Launch the mobile app and establish a connection with the headset.
While connected to the app, perform a PC-based firmware downgrade of the headset.
Wait for the PC downgrade to finish.
Unplug the headset from the PC.
Perform a PC-based firmware downgrade of the charge stand.
Place the headset onto the downgraded charge stand.
Without restarting the mobile app, navigate to the 'Update All' screen.
Tap the 'Update All' button.
Monitor the update progress and any error messages.
If the update fails, verify if any recovery options (e.g., 'Restart', 'Retry', 'Force Update') are presented.
Restart the mobile app and check if the headset can now be updated.
expected: The 'Update All' flow should handle the full multi-step sequence gracefully. The update should either succeed or, upon failure, offer a recovery mechanism (restart/retry) without requiring the user to manually restart the app. After app restart, the headset should be in a state where it can be updated normally.

title: DFU Update All - Interaction between PC firmware downgrade and mobile app update functionality
steps: Connect the headset to the mobile app and note the current firmware version.
Perform a PC-based firmware downgrade of the headset to an older version.
Do NOT disconnect the headset from the app or restart the app.
Open the 'Update All' section in the mobile app.
Verify the firmware version displayed in the app matches the downgraded version.
Tap 'Update All' to trigger the firmware update.
Observe whether the update starts, fails, or behaves unexpectedly.
If the update fails, check for any error messages or recovery prompts.
Restart the mobile app and attempt the update again.
expected: The mobile app should correctly detect the downgraded firmware version and offer the 'Update All' option. The update should either complete successfully or, if it fails due to the PC downgrade interaction, provide a clear error message with a recovery option (restart/retry). The app should not require a full restart to recover from the failure.

title: DFU Update All - Intermittent failure recovery without app restart
steps: Connect the headset to the mobile app.
Perform a PC-based firmware downgrade of the headset.
Unplug the headset from the PC.
Place the headset on the charge stand (which has not been downgraded).
Open the mobile app and navigate to 'Update All'.
Tap 'Update All' and observe the result.
If the update fails, check if a 'Restart' or 'Retry' option is available on the screen.
If available, tap the recovery option (e.g., 'Retry').
Observe if the update proceeds on the retry attempt.
If no recovery option is available, restart the app and check if the headset can be updated.
expected: If the 'Update All' action fails intermittently, the app should provide an immediate recovery option (e.g., 'Retry' or 'Restart') without requiring the user to close and reopen the app. The retry should either succeed or provide further guidance. The headset should not remain in an outdated state indefinitely.
